option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
package com.example.woofie.data
import com.example.woofie.model.Profession import com.example.woofie.model.QuizQuestion import com.example.woofie.model.UserProfile
object WoofieRepository { data class LessonStage( val number: Int, val title: String, val lessonRange: IntRange )
data class LessonOutcome( val correctAnswers: Int, val totalQuestions: Int, val earnedXp: Int, val passed: Boolean ) { val scoreLabel: String = "$correctAnswers/$totalQuestions" }
const val LESSON_SIZE = 8 const val MIN_CORRECT_TO_PASS = 6
var profile: UserProfile? = null var lastResultLabel: String? = null var lastEarnedXp: Int = 0 var lastLessonPassed: Boolean = false
fun getLessonStages(profession: Profession): List<LessonStage> { return when (profession) { Profession.IT -> listOf( LessonStage(1, "Entorno IT y componentes fisicos", 1..2), LessonStage(2, "Hardware en el trabajo", 3..4), LessonStage(3, "Redes y soporte tecnico", 5..6), LessonStage(4, "Frontend y colaboracion agil", 7..8) )
Profession.HEALTH -> listOf( LessonStage(1, "Comunicacion con pacientes", 1..2), LessonStage(2, "Signos vitales y seguimiento", 3..4), LessonStage(3, "Indicaciones y medicacion", 5..6), LessonStage(4, "Alta y coordinacion clinica", 7..8) )
Profession.SALES -> listOf( LessonStage(1, "Prospeccion y contexto comercial", 1..2), LessonStage(2, "Discovery y necesidades", 3..4), LessonStage(3, "Objecciones y propuesta", 5..6), LessonStage(4, "Cierre y seguimiento", 7..8) ) } }
fun getTotalLessons(profession: Profession): Int { return getLessonStages(profession).sumOf { stage -> stage.lessonRange.count() } }
fun getQuestionsFor(profession: Profession): List<QuizQuestion> { return when (profession) { Profession.IT -> listOf( QuizQuestion( prompt = "How do you say 'ticket resuelto' in a sprint update?", options = listOf("Solved ticket", "Strong ticket", "Ticket weather"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Choose the best phrase for daily standup:", options = listOf("I blocked yesterday", "I am blocked by API", "I was coding table"), correctIndex = 1 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'deployment completed successfully'?", options = listOf("La reunion fue cancelada", "El despliegue termino bien", "No hay conexion"), correctIndex = 1 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Necesito revisar los logs del servidor'.", options = listOf("I need to review the server logs", "I need to paint the server", "I need to close the office"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase for code review request:", options = listOf("Could you review this pull request?", "Could you remove this keyboard?", "Could you call my manager now?"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'rollback to previous version'?", options = listOf("Avanzar a la siguiente version", "Volver a la version anterior", "Eliminar el proyecto"), correctIndex = 1 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'La API responde con timeout'.", options = listOf("The API responds with a timeout", "The API responds with a smile", "The API responds with a shortcut"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best sentence for sprint planning:", options = listOf("Let's estimate these tasks", "Let's cancel all tasks", "Let's ship without tests"), correctIndex = 0 ) )
Profession.HEALTH -> listOf( QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Tome este medicamento dos veces al dia'", options = listOf( "Take this medicine twice a day", "Drink this medicine all week", "Call this medicine now" ), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase to ask patient comfort:", options = listOf("Are you feeling comfortable?", "You are fine now?", "Can you sleep medicine?"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'follow-up appointment'?", options = listOf("Cita de seguimiento", "Cita urgente", "Examen de sangre"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Respire profundo, todo esta bajo control'.", options = listOf("Breathe deeply, everything is under control", "Run quickly, nothing is ready", "Drink this later"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase before checking vital signs:", options = listOf("I will check your vital signs", "I will cancel your room", "I will call your office"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Debe guardar reposo por tres dias'.", options = listOf("You should rest for three days", "You should walk for three hours", "You should skip your meal"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'discharge instructions'?", options = listOf("Instrucciones de alta", "Instrucciones de ingreso", "Resultado de radiografia"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase for pain scale question:", options = listOf("How would you rate your pain from 1 to 10?", "Can you pay now?", "Do you need a new room key?"), correctIndex = 0 ) )
Profession.SALES -> listOf( QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Podemos agendar una llamada de seguimiento'", options = listOf( "Can we schedule a follow-up call?", "Can we close now?", "Can we buy this later?" ), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Choose the best sentence for objection handling:", options = listOf("I understand your concern", "You are wrong", "This is impossible"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'pricing proposal attached'?", options = listOf("Propuesta de precios adjunta", "Cliente no responde", "Producto agotado"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Gracias por tu tiempo en la reunion'.", options = listOf("Thank you for your time in the meeting", "You are late for the meeting", "Let's stop this forever"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best opening for discovery call:", options = listOf("Can you tell me about your current process?", "Can you buy now in one minute?", "Can you send money first?"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Translate: 'Te envio un resumen por correo'.", options = listOf("I will send you a summary by email", "I will send you a car by noon", "I will send you a voice note to HR"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "What means 'decision-maker'?", options = listOf("Persona que toma la decision", "Persona que guarda facturas", "Persona que recibe paquetes"), correctIndex = 0 ), QuizQuestion( prompt = "Best phrase to schedule next step:", options = listOf("Does next Tuesday work for a demo?", "Do you want to cancel all meetings?", "Can you transfer now?"), correctIndex = 0 ) ) } }
fun registerLessonResult(correctAnswers: Int, totalAnswers: Int = LESSON_SIZE): LessonOutcome { val currentProfile = profile ?: return LessonOutcome( correctAnswers = correctAnswers, totalQuestions = totalAnswers, earnedXp = 0, passed = false )
val passedLesson = correctAnswers >= MIN_CORRECT_TO_PASS val earnedXp = (correctAnswers * 12) + if (passedLesson) 40 else 10
currentProfile.completedLessons += 1 currentProfile.xp += earnedXp currentProfile.streak += 1 lastResultLabel = "$correctAnswers/$totalAnswers" lastEarnedXp = earnedXp lastLessonPassed = passedLesson
return LessonOutcome( correctAnswers = correctAnswers, totalQuestions = totalAnswers, earnedXp = earnedXp, passed = passedLesson ) } }

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.fragment.app.FragmentContainerView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:id="@+id/fragmentContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/bg_woofie_gradient" />

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/bg_woofie_gradient" android:orientation="vertical">
<androidx.fragment.app.FragmentContainerView android:id="@+id/fragmentContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/bottomNavigation" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@color/woofie_surface" app:itemIconTint="@color/woofie_primary_dark" app:itemTextColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" app:labelVisibilityMode="labeled" /> </LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/lessonPathRoot" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/lesson_path_title" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textSize="26sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/lesson_path_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/pathContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:orientation="vertical" /> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/lessonPathRoot" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/lesson_path_title" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textSize="26sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/lesson_path_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" />
<HorizontalScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:scrollbars="none">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/pathTrailContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="4dp" /> </HorizontalScrollView>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/pathContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:orientation="vertical" /> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/textPracticeTitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/practice_center_title" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textPracticeSubtitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/practice_center_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardMatchPairs" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/woofie_surface" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:strokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="14dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/practice_match_pairs_title" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/practice_match_pairs_desc" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardSpeak" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/woofie_surface" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:strokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="14dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/practice_speak_title" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:text="@string/practice_speak_desc" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/cardReviewErrors" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/woofie_surface" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:strokeColor="@color/woofie_primary" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="14dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/practice_review_errors_title" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textPracticeReviewErrorsDesc" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/textVocabularyTitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textVocabularySubtitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/vocabularyContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:orientation="vertical" /> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingBottom="10dp">
<FrameLayout android:id="@+id/nodeAnchor" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="64dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/textNodeBadge" android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/lesson_node_unlocked" android:gravity="center" android:textSize="18sp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:id="@+id/textNodeConcept" android:layout_width="150dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/lesson_option_idle" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="2" android:padding="8dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" android:textSize="12sp" android:translationX="88dp" /> </FrameLayout>
<View android:id="@+id/pathConnector" android:layout_width="6dp" android:layout_height="26dp" android:layout_height="30dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:background="@color/woofie_primary_light" /> </LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingBottom="12dp">
<FrameLayout android:id="@+id/nodeAnchor" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="96dp">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/nodeContent" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="8dp">
<FrameLayout android:layout_width="74dp" android:layout_height="74dp">
<View android:id="@+id/nodeShadow" android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/lesson_node_locked" android:alpha="0.28" android:translationY="8dp" />
<View android:id="@+id/edgeTop" android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="3dp" android:layout_gravity="top|center_horizontal" android:background="@color/woofie_gray_200" />
<View android:id="@+id/edgeRight" android:layout_width="3dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical|end" android:background="@color/woofie_gray_200" />
<View android:id="@+id/edgeBottom" android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="3dp" android:layout_gravity="bottom|center_horizontal" android:background="@color/woofie_gray_200" />
<View android:id="@+id/edgeLeft" android:layout_width="3dp" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical|start" android:background="@color/woofie_gray_200" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textNodeBadge" android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:background="@drawable/lesson_node_unlocked" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@color/woofie_primary_dark" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </FrameLayout>
<TextView android:id="@+id/textNodeConcept" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="@drawable/lesson_option_idle" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="2" android:padding="8dp" android:textColor="@color/woofie_text_primary" android:textSize="13sp" /> </LinearLayout> </FrameLayout>
<View android:id="@+id/pathConnector" android:layout_width="6dp" android:layout_height="30dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:background="@color/woofie_primary_light" /> </LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <menu xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <item android:id="@+id/navigation_home" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_view" android:title="Inicio" /> <item android:id="@+id/navigation_path" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_directions" android:title="Camino" /> <item android:id="@+id/navigation_practice" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_edit" android:title="Practica" /> <item android:id="@+id/navigation_vocabulary" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_agenda" android:title="Vocabulario" /> <item android:id="@+id/navigation_progress" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_myplaces" android:title="Progreso" /> </menu>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <dimen name="woofie_vocab_stroke">1dp</dimen> <dimen name="woofie_vocab_spacing">10dp</dimen> <dimen name="woofie_vocab_padding">14dp</dimen> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <item name="lessonProgressBar" type="id" /> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <item name="lessonProgressBar" type="id" /> <item name="navigation_home" type="id" /> <item name="navigation_path" type="id" /> <item name="navigation_practice" type="id" /> <item name="navigation_vocabulary" type="id" /> <item name="navigation_progress" type="id" /> <item name="pathTrailContainer" type="id" /> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Woofie</string> <string name="wolf_content_description">Mascota lobo de Woofie</string>
<string name="onboarding_title">Bienvenido a Woofie</string> <string name="onboarding_subtitle">Tu app de ingles profesional con sesiones rapidas, claras y entretenidas.</string> <string name="onboarding_profession_title">Elige tu profesion</string> <string name="onboarding_level_title">Nivel sugerido para empezar</string> <string name="onboarding_summary">Ruta lista: %1$s - Nivel %2$s</string> <string name="onboarding_summary_empty">Selecciona profesion y nivel para activar tu plan.</string> <string name="onboarding_continue">Crear mi ruta</string>
<string name="profession_it">Tecnologia e IT</string> <string name="profession_health">Salud</string> <string name="profession_sales">Ventas y atencion</string> <string name="level_a1">A1</string> <string name="level_a2">A2</string> <string name="level_b1">B1</string>
<string name="home_greeting">Hola, vamos por tu racha</string> <string name="home_profession_detail">Ruta: %1$s (Nivel %2$s)\nFoco de hoy: %3$s</string> <string name="home_streak">Racha: %1$d dias | Lecciones: %2$d | XP: %3$d</string> <string name="home_start_lesson">Ver mapa de lecciones</string> <string name="home_open_progress">Ver progreso</string>
<string name="lesson_path_title">Camino Woofie</string> <string name="lesson_path_subtitle">Completa tus lecciones por etapas. Los cuadrados se desbloquean al avanzar.</string> <string name="lesson_path_trail_title">Camino numerico</string> <string name="lesson_path_trail_prefix">Camino: %1$s</string>
<string name="lesson_progress">Pregunta %1$d de %2$d</string> <string name="lesson_goal">Meta de la leccion: minimo 6 de 8 correctas.</string> <string name="lesson_check">Revisar respuesta</string> <string name="lesson_next">Siguiente</string> <string name="lesson_select_option">Elige una opcion para continuar.</string> <string name="lesson_correct">Excelente. Tu respuesta es correcta.</string> <string name="lesson_incorrect">Casi. Respuesta correcta: %1$s</string> <string name="lesson_feedback_title">Por que esta mal esta respuesta</string> <string name="lesson_feedback_body">Elegiste "%1$s", pero en este contexto la expresion correcta es "%2$s". Esa opcion comunica la idea profesional esperada para esta situacion.</string> <string name="lesson_feedback_expand">Toca para ampliar</string> <string name="lesson_feedback_collapse">Toca para contraer</string>
<string name="progress_title">Buen trabajo en %1$s</string> <string name="progress_summary">Lecciones completadas: %1$d\nRacha actual: %2$d dias\nXP acumulado: %3$d\nNivel actual: %4$s</string> <string name="progress_last_result">Resultado de hoy: %1$s</string> <string name="progress_points_earned">Puntos ganados en esta leccion: +%1$d XP</string> <string name="progress_pass_status">Estado: %1$s (objetivo minimo 6/8)</string> <string name="progress_passed">Leccion aprobada</string> <string name="progress_not_passed">Leccion completada, sigue practicando</string> <string name="progress_back_home">Volver al inicio</string> <string name="progress_restart">Reiniciar plan profesional</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">Woofie</string> <string name="wolf_content_description">Mascota lobo de Woofie</string>
<string name="onboarding_title">Bienvenido a Woofie</string> <string name="onboarding_subtitle">Tu app de ingles profesional con sesiones rapidas, claras y entretenidas.</string> <string name="onboarding_profession_title">Elige tu profesion</string> <string name="onboarding_level_title">Nivel sugerido para empezar</string> <string name="onboarding_summary">Ruta lista: %1$s - Nivel %2$s</string> <string name="onboarding_summary_empty">Selecciona profesion y nivel para activar tu plan.</string> <string name="onboarding_continue">Crear mi ruta</string>
<string name="profession_it">Tecnologia e IT</string> <string name="profession_health">Salud</string> <string name="profession_sales">Ventas y atencion</string> <string name="level_a1">A1</string> <string name="level_a2">A2</string> <string name="level_b1">B1</string>
<string name="home_greeting">Hola, vamos por tu racha</string> <string name="home_profession_detail">Ruta: %1$s (Nivel %2$s)\nFoco de hoy: %3$s</string> <string name="home_streak">Racha: %1$d dias | Lecciones: %2$d | XP: %3$d</string> <string name="home_start_lesson">Ver mapa de lecciones</string> <string name="home_open_progress">Ver progreso</string>
<string name="nav_home">Inicio</string> <string name="nav_path">Camino</string> <string name="nav_practice">Practica</string> <string name="nav_vocabulary">Vocabulario</string> <string name="nav_progress">Progreso</string>
<string name="practice_center_title">Centro de practica</string> <string name="practice_center_subtitle">Entrena habilidades clave y fortalece tus puntos debiles.</string> <string name="practice_match_pairs_title">Juntar pares</string> <string name="practice_match_pairs_desc">Relaciona termino y significado para ganar velocidad.</string> <string name="practice_speak_title">Repetir en voz</string> <string name="practice_speak_desc">Escucha una frase y repitela para mejorar pronunciacion.</string> <string name="practice_review_errors_title">Repasar errores</string> <string name="practice_review_errors_desc">Tienes %1$d errores recientes listos para practicar.</string> <string name="practice_speak_coming_soon">La practica de voz estara disponible pronto.</string> <string name="practice_no_errors_yet">Aun no tienes errores recientes para repasar.</string>
<string name="lesson_path_title">Camino Woofie</string> <string name="lesson_path_subtitle">Completa tus lecciones por etapas. Los cuadrados se desbloquean al avanzar.</string> <string name="lesson_path_stage_title">Etapa %1$d: %2$s</string> <string name="lesson_path_trail_title">Camino numerico</string> <string name="lesson_path_trail_prefix">Camino: %1$s</string>
<string name="lesson_progress">Pregunta %1$d de %2$d</string> <string name="lesson_goal">Meta de la leccion: minimo 6 de 8 correctas.</string> <string name="lesson_check">Revisar respuesta</string> <string name="lesson_next">Siguiente</string> <string name="lesson_select_option">Elige una opcion para continuar.</string> <string name="lesson_correct">Excelente. Tu respuesta es correcta.</string> <string name="lesson_incorrect">Casi. Respuesta correcta: %1$s</string> <string name="lesson_feedback_title">Por que esta mal esta respuesta</string> <string name="lesson_feedback_body">Elegiste "%1$s", pero en este contexto la expresion correcta es "%2$s". Esa opcion comunica la idea profesional esperada para esta situacion.</string> <string name="lesson_feedback_expand">Toca para ampliar</string> <string name="lesson_feedback_collapse">Toca para contraer</string>
<string name="vocabulary_title">Vocabulario tecnico</string> <string name="vocabulary_subtitle">Terminos clave para %1$s</string> <string name="vocabulary_term_format"><![CDATA[%1$s %2$s Ejemplo: %3$s]]></string>
<string name="progress_title">Buen trabajo en %1$s</string> <string name="progress_summary">Lecciones completadas: %1$d\nRacha actual: %2$d dias\nXP acumulado: %3$d\nNivel actual: %4$s</string> <string name="progress_last_result">Resultado de hoy: %1$s</string> <string name="progress_points_earned">Puntos ganados en esta leccion: +%1$d XP</string> <string name="progress_pass_status">Estado: %1$s (objetivo minimo 6/8)</string> <string name="progress_passed">Leccion aprobada</string> <string name="progress_not_passed">Leccion completada, sigue practicando</string> <string name="progress_back_home">Volver al inicio</string> <string name="progress_restart">Reiniciar plan profesional</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <corners android:radius="14dp" /> <solid android:color="#28000000" /> </shape>
